protontypes/awesome-robotic-tooling

Tooling for professional robotic development in C++ and Python with a touch of ROS, autonomous driving and aerospace: https://freerobotics.tools/
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

This week

Datasets

  • ONCE dataset - A large-scale autonomous driving dataset with 2D&3D object annotations.

    • May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021

    Documentation and Presentation

  • Zoterostars3.8k - A free, easy-to-use tool to help you collect, organize, cite, and share your research sources.

    • Sensor Processing

    Calibration and Transformation

  • e2calibstars52 - Contains code that implements video reconstruction from event data for calibration.

    • May 24th - May 30th, 2021

    Operation System

    Monitoring

  • ShellHub - ShellHub is a modern SSH server for remotely accessing linux devices via command line (using any SSH client) or web-based user interface, designed as an alternative to sshd. Think ShellHub as centralized SSH for the the edge and cloud computing.
  • Sshwiftystars547 - Sshwifty is a SSH and Telnet connector made for the Web.

    • Data Visualization and Mission Control

  • ROS-Mobilestars154 - Visualization and controlling application for Android.

    • May 10th - May 16th, 2021

    Localization and State Estimation

  • libRSFstars95 - A robust sensor fusion library for online localization.

    • Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021

    Simulation

  • AI2-THORstars497 - Python framework with a Unity backend providing interaction, navigation, and manipulation support for household based robotic agents, consisting of 200+ of custom scenes, 1500+ custom annotated objects, and 200+ actions.

    • Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021

    Data Visualization and Mission Control

  • Foxglove Studiostars141 - Robotics visualization and debugging.

    • Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021

    User Interaction

    Acoustic User Interface

  • TTSstars1.4k - A deep learning toolkit for Text-to-Speech, battle-tested in research and production.

    • Mar 8th - Mar 14th, 2021

    Network and Middleware

    Controller Area Network

  • awesome CANstars114 - A curated list of awesome CAN bus tools, hardware and resources.

    • Network and Middleware

  • mqtt_bridgestars78 - Provides a functionality to bridge between ROS and MQTT in bidirectional.

    • Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021

    Simulation

  • gym-pybullet-dronesstars229 - PyBullet-based Gym environments for single and multi-agent reinforcement learning of quadcopter control.

    • Documentation and Presentation

  • GanttLab - The easy to use, fully functional Gantt chart for GitLab and GitHub.

    • Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021

    Documentation and Presentation

  • gollumstars11.4k - A simple, Git-powered wiki with a sweet API and local frontend.

    • Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021

    Frameworks and Stacks

  • F Primestars8k - A component-driven framework that enables rapid development and deployment of spaceflight and other embedded software applications.

    • Electronics and Mechanics

  • OpenAeroStructstars95 - A lightweight tool that performs aerostructural optimization using OpenMDAO.

    • Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021

    Documentation and Presentation

  • SVGrepo - Download free SVG Vectors for commercial use.

    • Electronics and Mechanics

  • Inkscape Ray Opticsstars215 - An extension for Inkscape that makes it easier to draw optical diagrams.

    • Datasets

  • Papers With Code - Thousands of machine learning datasets provided by Papers With Code.

    • Sensor Processing

    Image Processing

  • libvipsstars5.4k - A fast image processing library with low memory needs.

    • Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021

    Sensor Processing

    Lidar and Point Cloud Processing

  • cuda-pclstars90 - Accelerating Lidar for Robotics with NVIDIA CUDA-based PCL.

    • Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021

    Data Visualization and Mission Control

  • ipyganystars313 - 3-D Scientific Visualization in the Jupyter Notebook.

    • Frameworks and Stacks

  • ArduPilotstars5.8k - Open source control software for autonomous vehicles - copters/planes/rovers/boats/submersibles.

    • Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021

    Simultaneous Localization and Mapping

    Lidar

  • M-LOAMstars136 - Robust Odometry and Mapping for Multi-LiDAR Systems with Online Extrinsic Calibration.

    • Data Visualization and Mission Control

  • PyQtGraphstars2.4k - Fast data visualization and GUI tools for scientific / engineering applications.

    • Frameworks and Stacks

  • cloverstars187 - ROS-based framework and RPi image to control PX4-powered drones.

    • Simulation

  • Cloestars10 - Empowers developers of automated-driving software components by providing a unified interface to closed-loop simulation.

    • Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2021

    Network and Middleware

    Sensor and Acuator Interfaces

  • TauLidarCamerastars20 - The host-side API for building applications with the Tau LiDAR Camera.

    • Documentation and Presentation

  • Excalidrawstars20.4k - Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams.
  • PlotNeuralNetstars12.9k - Latex code for drawing neural networks for reports and presentation.

    • Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021

    Frameworks and Stacks

  • JdeRobot Academystars124 - JdeRobot Academy is an open source collection of exercises to learn robotics in a practical way.

    • Network and Middleware

  • micro-ROS for Arduinostars90 - A experimental micro-ROS library for baremetal projects based on Arduino IDE or Arduino CLI.

    • Dec 28th - Jan 3rd, 2020

    Development Environment

    Debugging and Tracing

  • ros2_tracing - Tracing tools for ROS 2.

    • Dec 21st - Dec 27th, 2020

    Sensor Processing

    Image Processing

  • eo-learnstars734 - A collection of open source Python packages that have been developed to seamlessly access and process spatio-temporal image sequences acquired by any satellite fleet in a timely and automatic manner.

    • Data Visualization and Mission Control

  • K3D-tools - Jupyter notebook extension for 3D visualization.

    • Simultaneous Localization and Mapping

    Lidar

  • LIO_SAMstars1.1k - Tightly-coupled Lidar Inertial Odometry via Smoothing and Mapping.

    • Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2020

    Sensor Processing

    Lidar and Point Cloud Processing

  • SA-SSDstars369 - Structure Aware Single-stage 3D Object Detection from Point Cloud.

    • Architecture and Design

  • Architecture_Decision_Recordstars4.7k - A document that captures an important architectural decision made along with its context and consequences.

    • Dec 7th - Dec 13th, 2020

    Documentation and Presentation

  • mkdocsstars12.1k - A fast, simple and downright gorgeous static site generator that's geared towards building project documentation.

    • Sensor Processing

    Lidar and Point Cloud Processing

  • CamVoxstars224 - A low-cost SLAM system based on camera and Livox lidar.

    • Frameworks and Stacks

  • COMPASstars43 - Robotic fabrication package for the COMPAS Framework.

    • Sensor Processing

    Image Processing

  • satpystars699 - A python library for reading and manipulating meteorological remote sensing data and writing it to various image and data file formats.
  • AliceVisionstars1.8k - A Photogrammetric Computer Vision Framework which provides a 3D Reconstruction and Camera Tracking algorithms.

    • Simulation

  • BlueSkystars160 - The goal of BlueSky is to provide everybody who wants to visualize, analyze or simulate air traffic with a tool to do so without any restrictions, licenses or limitations.

    • Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020

    Simulation

  • Unity-Robotics-Hubstars526 - Central repository for tools, tutorials, resources, and documentation for robotic simulation in Unity.

    • Simultaneous Localization and Mapping

    Visual

  • gradslamstars894 - An open source differentiable dense SLAM library for PyTorch.

    • Nov 16th - Nov 22nd, 2020

    Sensor Processing

    Machine Learning

  • nnstreamer-rosstars11 - A set of Gstreamer plugins and ROS examples that allow Gstreamer developers to adopt neural network models easily and efficiently and neural network developers to manage neural network pipelines and their filters easily and efficiently.

    • Planning and Control

  • se2_navigationstars109 - Pure pursuit controller and Reeds-Shepp sampling based planner for navigation in SE(2) space.

    • Development Environment

    Code and Run

  • Gitpodstars3.9k - An open source developer platform that automates the provisioning of ready-to-code development environments.

    • Sensor Processing

    Lidar and Point Cloud Processing

  • kaolinstars2.5k - A PyTorch Library for Accelerating 3D Deep Learning Research.

    • Network and Middleware

    Sensor and Acuator Interfaces

  • blickfeld-scanner-libstars6 - Cross-platform library to communicate with LiDAR devices of the Blickfeld GmbH.

    • Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2020

    Communication and Coordination

  • Chronos-Timetrackerstars276 - Desktop client for JIRA. Track time, upload worklogs without a hassle.
  • gitlab-triage - Gitlab's issues and merge requests triage, automated.
  • discoursestars33.3k - A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.
  • leantimestars762 - Leantime is a lean project management system for innovators.
  • Agile Development - Manifesto for Agile Software Development.
  • Gitflowstars25k - Makes parallel development very easy, by isolating new development from finished work.
  • DeepLstars44 - An online translator that outperforms Google, Microsoft and Facebook.
  • Taigastars290 - Agile Projectmanagment Tool.
  • Kanboardstars5.9k - Minimalistic Kanban Board.
  • kanban - Free, open source, self-hosted, Kanban board for GitLab issues.
  • Gitlabstars6.8k - Simple Selfhosted Gitlab Server with Docker.
  • Gogsstars37k - Build a simple, stable and extensible self-hosted Git service that can be setup in the most painless way.
  • Wekanstars17.3k - Meteor based Kanban Board.
  • JIRA APIstars1.3k - Python Library for REST API of Jira.
  • Taiga APIstars81 - Python Library for REST API of Taiga.
  • Grge - Grge is a daemon and command line utility augmenting GitLab.
  • Helpystars2k - A modern, open source helpdesk customer support application.
  • ONLYOFFICEstars1.4k - A free open source collaborative system developed to manage documents, projects, customer relationship and email correspondence, all in one place.
  • Gerrit - A code review and project management tool for Git based projects.
  • jitsi-meetstars16k - Secure, Simple and Scalable Video Conferences that you use as a standalone app or embed in your web application.
  • mattermoststars20.3k - An open source, private cloud, Slack-alternative.
  • openprojectstars4.8k - The leading open source project management software.

    • Documentation and Presentation

  • GitLab-Release-Note-Generatorstars61 - A Gitlab release note generator that generates release note on latest tag.
  • actions-hugo - Deploy website based on Hugo to GitHub Pages.
  • github-changelog-generatorstars6.4k - Automatically generate change log from your tags, issues, labels and pull requests on GitHub.
  • opensourcedesign - Community and Resources for Free Design and Logo Creation.
  • Typora - A Minimalist Markdown Editor.
  • Markorstars1.5k - A Simple Markdown Editor for your Android Device.
  • Pandocstars22.5k - Universal markup converter.
  • Yaspellerstars564 - Command line tool for spell checking.
  • ReadtheDocs - Build your local ReadtheDocs Server.
  • Doxygenstars3.6k - Doxygen is the de facto standard tool for generating documentation from annotated C++ sources.
  • Sphinxstars3.9k - A tool that makes it easy to create intelligent and beautiful documentation for Python projects.
  • Word-to-Markdownstars1.2k - A ruby gem to liberate content from Microsoft Word document.
  • paperlessstars7.6k - Index and archive all of your scanned paper documents.
  • carbonstars27.4k - Share beautiful images of your source code.
  • undraw - Free Professional business SVGs easy to customize.
  • asciinemastars9.2k - Lets you easily record terminal sessions and replay them in a terminal as well as in a web browser.
  • inkscape - Inkscape is a professional vector graphics editor for Linux, Windows and macOS.
  • jupyter2slidesstars765 - Cloud Native Presentation Slides with Jupyter Notebook + Reveal.js.
  • patatstars1.5k - Terminal-based presentations using Pandoc.
  • OCRmyPDFstars4.2k - Adds an OCR text layer to scanned PDF files, allowing them to be searched.
  • papermillstars4.1k - A tool for parameterizing, executing, and analyzing Jupyter Notebooks.
  • docsystars224 - An example documentation site using the Docsy Hugo theme.
  • overleafstars8.4k - An open-source online real-time collaborative LaTeX editor.
  • landslidestars2k - Generate HTML5 slideshows from markdown, ReST, or textile.
  • libreoffice-impress-templatesstars246 - Freely-licensed LibreOffice Impress templates.
  • olive - A free non-linear video editor aiming to provide a fully-featured alternative to high-end professional video editing software.
  • bukustars4.4k - Browser-independent bookmark manager.
  • swiftlatex - A WYSIWYG Browser-based LaTeX Editor.
  • ReLaXedstars11.6k - Allows complex PDF layouts to be defined with CSS and JavaScript, while writing the content in a friendly, minimal syntax close to Markdown or LaTeX.
  • CodiMDstars1.9k - Open Source Online Real-time collaborate on team documentation in markdown.
  • jupyter-bookstars2.2k - Build interactive, publication-quality documents from Jupyter Notebooks.
  • InvoiceNetstars1.7k - Deep neural network to extract intelligent information from invoice documents.
  • tesseractstars39.9k - Open Source OCR Engine.

    • Requirements and Safety

  • open-autonomous-safetystars159 - OAS is a fully open-source library of Voyage's safety processes and testing procedures, designed to supplement existing safety programs at self-driving car startups across the world.
  • CarND-Functional-Safety-Projectstars59 - Create functional safety documents in this Udacity project.
  • Automated Valet Parking Safety Documents - Created to support the safe testing of the Automated Valet Parking function using the StreetDrone test vehicle in a car park.
  • safe_numericsstars171 - Replacements to standard numeric types which throw exceptions on errors.
  • Air Vehicle C++ development coding standards - Provide direction and guidance to C++ programmers that will enable them to employ good programming style and proven programming practices leading to safe, reliable, testable, and maintainable code.
  • AUTOSAR Coding Standard - Guidelines for the use of the C++14 language in critical and safety-related system.
  • The W-Model and Lean Scaled Agility for Engineering - Ford applied an agile V-Model method from Vector that can be used in safety related project management.
  • doorstopstars267 - Requirements management using version control.

    • Architecture and Design

  • vscode-drawiostars7.2k - This extension integrates Draw.io into VS Code.
  • Plantumlstars961 - Web application to generate UML diagrams on-the-fly in your live documentation.
  • draw.io - A free online diagram software for making flowcharts, process diagrams, org charts, UML, ER and network diagrams.
  • Guidelines - How to architect ROS-based systems.
  • yEd - A powerful desktop application that can be used to quickly and effectively generate high-quality diagrams.
  • yed_pystars46 - Generates graphML that can be opened in yEd.
  • rqt_graph - Provides a GUI plugin for visualizing the ROS computation graph.
  • cpp-dependenciesstars610 - Tool to check C++ #include dependencies (dependency graphs created in .dot format).
  • pydepsstars729 - Python Module Dependency graphs.
  • aztarnastars82 - A footprinting tool for robots.

    • Frameworks and Stacks

  • Aslanstars169 - Open source self-driving software for low speed environments.
  • open-source-roverstars6.7k - A build-it-yourself, 6-wheel rover based on the rovers on Mars from JPL.
  • pyboticsstars201 - An open-source and peer-reviewed Python toolbox for robot kinematics and calibration.
  • mir_robotstars98 - This is a community project to use the MiR Robots with ROS.
  • OpenPilotstars25k - Open Source Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) and Lane Keeping Assist System (LKAS).
  • ROS - (Robot Operating System) provides libraries and tools to help software developers create robot applications.
  • Autoware.Auto - Autoware.Auto applies best-in-class software engineering for autonomous driving.
  • Autoware.ai - Autoware.AI is the world's first "All-in-One" open-source software for autonomous driving technology.
  • Stanford Self Driving Car Codestars698 - Stanford Code From Cars That Entered DARPA Grand Challenges.
  • CARMAPlatformstars246 - Enables cooperative automated driving plug-in.
  • Automotive Grade Linux - Automotive Grade Linux is a collaborative open source project that is bringing together automakers, suppliers and technology companies to accelerate the development and adoption of a fully open software stack for the connected car.
  • PX4stars4.4k - An open source flight control software for drones and other unmanned vehicles.
  • KubOSstars229 - An open-source software stack for satellites.
  • makanistars1.1k - Contains the working Makani flight simulator, controller (autopilot), visualizer, and command center flight monitoring tools.

    • Development Environment

    Code and Run

  • reboundstars3.5k - Command-line tool that instantly fetches Stack Overflow results when an exception is thrown.
  • roslibpystars148 - Python ROS Bridge library allows to use Python and IronPython to interact with ROS, the open-source robotic middleware.
  • mybinder - Open notebooks in an executable environment, making your code immediately reproducible by anyone, anywhere.
  • Vim-rosstars111 - Vim plugin for ROS development.
  • atomstars55k - Hackable text editor for the 21st century.
  • Teletypestars2.3k - Share your workspace with team members and collaborate on code in real time in Atom.
  • Sublime - A sophisticated text editor for code, markup and prose.
  • ade-cli - The ADE Development Environment (ADE) uses docker and Gitlab to manage environments of per project development tools and optional volume images.
  • recipe-wizardstars15 - A Dockerfile generator for running OpenGL (GLX) applications with nvidia-docker2, CUDA, ROS, and Gazebo on a remote headless server system.
  • Jupyter ROSstars420 - Jupyter widget helpers for ROS, the Robot Operating System.
  • ros_rqt_pluginstars299 - The ROS Qt Creator Plug-in for Python.
  • xeus-clingstars1.8k - Jupyter kernel for the C++ programming language.
  • TabNinestars8.2k - The all-language autocompleter.
  • kite - Use machine learning to give you useful code completions for Python.
  • jedistars4.8k - Autocompletion and static analysis library for python.
  • pybind11stars9.1k - Seamless operability between C++11 and Python.
  • Sourcetrailstars11.3k - Free and open-source cross-platform source explorer.
  • ROSOnWindows - An experimental release of ROS1 for Windows.
  • live-sharestars1.8k - Real-time collaborative development from the comfort of your favorite tools.
  • cocalcstars912 - Collaborative Calculation in the Cloud.
  • EasyClangCompletestars541 - Robust C/C++ code completion for Sublime Text 3.
  • vscode-rosstars146 - Visual Studio Code extension for Robot Operating System (ROS) development.
  • awesome-hppstars1.3k - A curated list of awesome header-only C++ libraries.

    • Development Environment

    Build and Deploy

  • rosbuild - The ROS build farm.
  • crosstars33 - A single thread pure C implementation of the ROS framework.
  • superflorestars32 - An extended platform release manager for Robot Operating System.
  • gitlab-release - Simple python3 script to upload files (from ci) to the current projects release (tag).
  • qemu-user-staticstars909 - Enable an execution of different multi-architecture containers by QEMU and binfmt_misc.
  • Cross compile ROS 2 on QNX - Introduces how to cross compile ROS 2 on QNX.
  • bloomstars37 - A release automation tool which makes releasing catkin packages easier.
  • catkin_toolsstars115 - Command line tools for working with catkin.
  • industrial_cistars154 - Easy continuous integration repository for ROS repositories.
  • ros_gitlab_ci - Contains helper scripts and instructions on how to use Continuous Integration (CI) for ROS projects hosted on a GitLab instance.
  • gitlab-runner - Runs tests and sends the results to GitLab.
  • colcon-corestars56 - Command line tool to improve the workflow of building, testing and using multiple software packages.
  • clangstars2.8k - This is a compiler front-end for the C family of languages (C, C++, Objective-C, and Objective-C++) which is built as part of the LLVM compiler infrastructure project.
  • catkin_virtualenvstars46 - Bundle python requirements in a catkin package via virtualenv.
  • pyenvstars23.3k - Simple Python version management.
  • aptlystars2k - Debian repository management tool.
  • cross_compilestars80 - Assets used for ROS2 cross-compilation.
  • docker_imagesstars245 - Official Docker images maintained by OSRF on ROS(2) and Gazebo.
  • robot_upstartstars126 - Presents a suite of scripts to assist with launching background ROS processes on Ubuntu Linux PCs.
  • robot_systemd - Units for managing startup and shutdown of roscore and roslaunch.
  • ryo-iso - A modern ISO builder that streamlines the process of deploying a complete robot operating system from a yaml config file.
  • network_autoconfig - Automatic configuration of ROS networking for most use cases without impacting usage that require manual configuration.

    • Development Environment

    Unit and Integration Test

  • setup-rosstars38 - This action sets up a ROS and ROS 2 environment for use in GitHub actions.
  • googleteststars22k - Google's C++ test framework.
  • action-ros-cistars44 - GitHub Action to build and test ROS 2 packages using colcon.
  • pyteststars7.3k - The pytest framework makes it easy to write small tests, yet scales to support complex functional testing.
  • docteststars3.2k - The fastest feature-rich C++11/14/17/20 single-header testing framework for unit tests and TDD.
  • osrf_testing_tools_cppstars22 - Contains testing tools for C++, and is used in OSRF projects.
  • code_coveragestars28 - ROS package to run coverage testing.

    • Development Environment

    Lint and Format

  • action-ros-lintstars12 - GitHub action to run linters on ROS 2 packages.
  • cppcheckstars3.5k - Static analysis of C/C++ code.
  • hadolintstars5.3k - Dockerfile linter, validate inline bash, written in Haskell.
  • catkin_lintstars47 - Checks package configurations for the catkin build system of ROS.
  • harosstars119 - Static analysis of ROS application code.
  • shellcheckstars24.7k - A static analysis tool for shell scripts.
  • blackstars20.9k - The uncompromising Python code formatter.
  • pydocstylestars767 - A static analysis tool for checking compliance with Python docstring conventions.
  • pydanticstars6.3k - Data parsing and validation using Python type hints.

    • Development Environment

    Debugging and Tracing

  • FlameGraphstars11.2k - Visualize profiled code.
  • lttng - An open source software toolkit which you can use to simultaneously trace the Linux kernel, user applications, and user libraries.
  • memory_profilerstars2.9k - A python module for monitoring memory consumption of a process as well as line-by-line analysis of memory consumption for python programs.
  • ros1_fuzzerstars13 - This fuzzer aims to help developers and researchers to find bugs and vulnerabilities in ROS nodes by performing fuzz tests over topics that the target nodes process.
  • heaptrackstars1.5k - Traces all memory allocations and annotates these events with stack traces.
  • Linuxperf - Various Linux performance material.
  • lptracestars671 - It lets you see in real-time what functions a Python program is running.
  • pyre-checkstars5.3k - Performant type-checking for python.
  • gpuvisstars560 - GPU Trace Visualizer.
  • sanitizerstars6.7k - AddressSanitizer, ThreadSanitizer, MemorySanitizer.
  • cppinsightsstars1.5k - C++ Insights - See your source code with the eyes of a compiler.
  • inspect - The inspect module provides functions for learning about live objects, including modules, classes, instances, functions, and methods.
  • pyperformancestars414 - Python Performance Benchmark Suite.
  • qirastars3.2k - QIRA is a competitor to strace and gdb.
  • ros2-performancestars113 - Allows to easily create arbitrary ROS2 systems and then measures their performance.
  • bccstars11.6k - Tools for BPF-based Linux IO analysis, networking, monitoring, and more.
  • bpftracestars3.8k - High-level tracing language for Linux eBPF.
  • pudbstars2k - Full-screen console debugger for Python.
  • backward-cppstars1.9k - A beautiful stack trace pretty printer for C++.
  • libstatistics_collectorstars16 - ROS 2 library providing classes to collect measurements and calculate statistics across them.
  • system_metrics_collectorstars15 - Lightweight, real-time system metrics collector for ROS2 systems.

    • Development Environment

    Version Control

  • gitgstars126 - A graphical user interface for git.
  • python-gitlabstars1.5k - A Python package providing access to the GitLab server API.
  • nbdimestars2k - Tools for diffing and merging of Jupyter notebooks.
  • git-fuzzystars1.8k - A CLI interface to git that relies heavily on fzf.
  • meldstars678 - Meld is a visual diff and merge tool that helps you compare files, directories, and version controlled projects.
  • tigstars10k - Text-mode interface for git.
  • git-colastars1.7k - The highly caffeinated Git GUI.
  • semantic-releasestars12.6k - Fully automated version management and package publishing.
  • go-semrel-gitab - Automate version management for Gitlab.
  • Git-repo - Git-Repo helps manage many Git repositories, does the uploads to revision control systems, and automates parts of the development workflow.
  • divestars26.1k - A tool for exploring each layer in a docker image.
  • dvcstars7.9k - Management and versioning of datasets and machine learning models.
  • learnGitBranchingstars21.3k - A git repository visualizer, sandbox, and a series of educational tutorials and challenges.
  • git-secretstars2.4k - Encrypts files with permitted users' public keys, allowing users you trust to access encrypted data using pgp and their secret keys.
  • glabstars1.2k - An open-source GitLab command line tool.

    • Simulation

  • highway-envstars740 - A collection of environments for autonomous driving and tactical decision-making tasks.
  • ROSIntegrationVisionstars47 - Support for ROS-enabled RGBD data acquisition in Unreal Engine Projects.
  • rotors_simulatorstars719 - Provides some multirotor models.
  • rex-gymstars705 - OpenAI Gym environments for an open-source quadruped robot (SpotMicro).
  • Drakestars1.9k - Drake aims to simulate even very complex dynamics of robots.
  • carlastars5.9k - Open-source simulator for autonomous driving research.
  • ros-bridgestars223 - ROS bridge for CARLA Simulator.
  • scenario_runnerstars190 - Traffic scenario definition and execution engine.
  • deepdivestars646 - End-to-end simulation for self-driving cars.
  • uuv_simulatorstars348 - Gazebo/ROS packages for underwater robotics simulation.
  • AirSimstars11.7k - Open source simulator for autonomous vehicles built on Unreal Engine.
  • self-driving-car-simstars3.4k - A self-driving car simulator built with Unity.
  • ROSIntegrationstars218 - Unreal Engine Plugin to enable ROS Support.
  • gym-gazebostars681 - An OpenAI gym extension for using Gazebo known as gym-gazebo.
  • VREP Interface - ROS Bridge for the VREP simulator.
  • sumostars1.1k - Eclipse SUMO is an open source, highly portable, microscopic and continuous road traffic simulation package designed to handle large road networks.
  • ESIMstars286 - An Open Event Camera Simulator.
  • Mengestars108 - Crowd Simulation Framework.
  • pedsim_rosstars204 - Pedestrian simulator powered by the social force model for Gazebo.
  • opencrg - Open file formats and open source tools for the detailed description, creation and evaluation of road surfaces.
  • esministars157 - A basic OpenSCENARIO player.
  • OpenSceneGraphstars2.1k - An open source high performance 3D graphics toolkit, used by application developers in fields such as visual simulation, games, virtual reality, scientific visualization and modelling.
  • morse - An academic robotic simulator, based on the Blender Game Engine and the Bullet Physics engine.
  • fetch_gazebostars66 - Contains the Gazebo simulation for Fetch Robotics Fetch and Freight Research Edition Robots.
  • flowstars640 - A computational framework for deep RL and control experiments for traffic microsimulation.
  • gnss-ins-simstars459 - GNSS + inertial navigation, sensor fusion simulator. Motion trajectory generator, sensor models, and navigation.
  • simulation assets for the SubT - This collection contains simulation assets for the SubT Challenge Virtual Competition in Gazebo.
  • gazebo_ros_motorsstars55 - Contains currently two motor plugins for Gazebo, one with an ideal speed controller and one without a controller that models a DC motor.
  • map2gazebostars63 - ROS package for creating Gazebo environments from 2D maps.
  • sim_vehicle_dynamicsstars41 - Vehicle Dynamics Simulation Software of TUM Roborace Team.
  • gym-carlastars183 - An OpenAI gym wrapper for CARLA simulator.
  • pylotstars123 - Autonomous driving platform running on the CARLA simulator.
  • flightmarestars445 - Flightmare is composed of two main components: a configurable rendering engine built on Unity and a flexible physics engine for dynamics simulation.
  • champstars589 - ROS Packages for CHAMP Quadruped Controller.
  • Trickstars529 - Developed at the NASA Johnson Space Center, is a powerful simulation development framework that enables users to build applications for all phases of space vehicle development.
  • usv_sim_lsastars139 - Unmanned Surface Vehicle simulation on Gazebo with water current and winds.
  • 42stars118 - Simulation for spacecraft attitude control system analysis and design.
  • Complete_Street_Rulestars83 - A scenario oriented design tool intended to enable users to quickly create procedurally generated multimodal streets in ArcGIS CityEngine.
  • fields-ignitionstars28 - Generate random crop fields for Ignition Gazebo.

    • Electronics and Mechanics

  • urdf-vizstars154 - Visualize URDF/XACRO file, URDF Viewer works on Windows/macOS/Linux.
  • riscv - The Free and Open RISC Instruction Set Architecture.
  • HRIMstars61 - An information model for robot hardware.
  • URDFstars41 - Repository for Unified Robot Description Format (URDF) parsing code.
  • solidworks_urdf_exporterstars131 - SolidWorks to URDF Exporter.
  • FreeCADstars9.3k - Your own 3D parametric modeler.
  • kicad - A Cross Platform and Open Source Electronics Design Automation Suite.
  • PcbDrawstars440 - Convert your KiCAD board into a nice looking 2D drawing suitable for pinout diagrams.
  • LibrePCBstars1.2k - A powerful, innovative and intuitive EDA tool for everyone.
  • openscadstars4k - A software for creating solid 3D CAD models.
  • ngspice - A open source spice simulator for electric and electronic circuits.
  • GNSS-SDRstars827 - GNSS-SDR provides interfaces for a wide range of radio frequency front-ends and raw sample file formats, generates processing outputs in standard formats.
  • urdfpystars83 - A simple and easy-to-use library for loading, manipulating, saving, and visualizing URDF files.
  • FMPystars152 - Simulate Functional Mockup Units (FMUs) in Python.
  • FMIKit-Simulinkstars66 - Import and export Functional Mock-up Units with Simulink.
  • oemof-solphstars181 - A modular open source framework to model energy supply systems.
  • SUAVEstars206 - An Aircraft Design Toolbox.
  • opemstars87 - The Open-Source PEMFC Simulation Tool (OPEM) is a modeling tool for evaluating the performance of proton exchange membrane fuel cells.
  • pvlib-pythonstars515 - A community supported tool that provides a set of functions and classes for simulating the performance of photovoltaic energy systems.
  • WireVizstars2.2k - A tool for easily documenting cables, wiring harnesses and connector pinouts.
  • tiglstars129 - The TiGL Geometry Library can be used for the computation and processing of aircraft geometries stored inside CPACS files.
  • foxBMSstars0 - A free, open and flexible development environment to design battery management systems.
  • cadCADstars269 - A Python package that assists in the processes of designing, testing and validating complex systems through simulation, with support for Monte Carlo methods, A/B testing and parameter sweeping.
  • ODrivestars1.2k - The aim is to make it possible to use inexpensive brushless motors in high performance robotics projects.

    • Sensor Processing

    Machine Learning

  • mlflowstars9.3k - A platform to streamline machine learning development, including tracking experiments, packaging code into reproducible runs, and sharing and deploying models.
  • DLIBstars10.1k - A toolkit for making real world machine learning and data analysis applications in C++.
  • tpotstars8k - A Python Automated Machine Learning tool that optimizes machine learning pipelines using genetic programming.
  • deapstars4.2k - Distributed Evolutionary Algorithms in Python.
  • Tensorflow Federatedstars1.5k - TensorFlow Federated (TFF) is an open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.
  • finnstars306 - Fast, Scalable Quantized Neural Network Inference on FPGAs.
  • neuropodstars867 - Neuropod is a library that provides a uniform interface to run deep learning models from multiple frameworks in C++ and Python.
  • leela-zerostars4.6k - This is a fairly faithful reimplementation of the system described in the Alpha Go Zero paper "Mastering the Game of Go without Human Knowledge".
  • Traxstars6.1k - A library for deep learning that focuses on sequence models and reinforcement learning.
  • Netronstars14.4k - Visualizer for neural network, deep learning and machine learning models.
  • MNNstars5.7k - A blazing fast, lightweight deep learning framework, battle-tested by business-critical use cases in Alibaba.
  • Tensorforcestars2.9k - An open-source deep reinforcement learning framework, with an emphasis on modularized flexible library design and straightforward usability for applications in research and practice.
  • Dopaminestars9.4k - A research framework for fast prototyping of reinforcement learning algorithms.
  • catalyststars2.6k - Was developed with a focus on reproducibility, fast experimentation and code/ideas reusing.
  • raystars15.9k - A fast and simple framework for building and running distributed applications.
  • ReAgentstars2.9k - An open source end-to-end platform for applied reinforcement learning (RL) developed and used at Facebook.

    • Sensor Processing

    Parallel Processing

  • Thruststars3.3k - A C++ parallel programming library which resembles the C++ Standard Library.
  • daskstars8.3k - Parallel computing with task scheduling for Python.
  • cupystars5.1k - NumPy-like API accelerated with CUDA.
  • ArrayFirestars3.5k - A general purpose GPU library.
  • OpenMP - An application programming interface that supports multi-platform shared memory multiprocessing programming in C, C++, and Fortran.
  • VexCLstars630 - VexCL is a C++ vector expression template library for OpenCL/CUDA/OpenMP.
  • PYNQstars1.2k - An open-source project from Xilinx that makes it easy to design embedded systems with Zynq All Programmable Systems on Chips.
  • numbastars6.5k - NumPy aware dynamic Python compiler using LLVM.
  • TensorRTstars3.7k - A C++ library for high performance inference on NVIDIA GPUs and deep learning accelerators.
  • libcudacxxstars1.7k - Provides a heterogeneous implementation of the C++ Standard Library that can be used in and between CPU and GPU code.

    • Sensor Processing

    Image Processing

  • opendatacamstars1.3k - Only saves surveyed meta-data, in particular the path an object moved or number of counted objects at a certain point.
  • kitti_scan_unfoldingstars3 - We propose KITTI scan unfolding in our paper Scan-based Semantic Segmentation of LiDAR Point Clouds: An Experimental Study.
  • TorchSegstars1.3k - This project aims at providing a fast, modular reference implementation for semantic segmentation models using PyTorch.
  • CV-pretrained-modelstars1k - A collection of computer vision pre-trained models.
  • image_pipelinestars357 - Fills the gap between getting raw images from a camera driver and higher-level vision processing.
  • gstreamer - A pipeline-based multimedia framework that links together a wide variety of media processing systems to complete complex workflows.
  • ros2_openvino_toolkitstars91 - Provides a ROS-adaptered runtime framework of neural network which quickly deploys applications and solutions for vision inference.
  • vision_vispstars124 - Wraps the ViSP moving edge tracker provided by the ViSP visual servoing library into a ROS package.
  • apriltag_rosstars167 - A ROS wrapper of the AprilTag 3 visual fiducial detector.
  • deep_object_posestars574 - Deep Object Pose Estimation.
  • DetectAndTrackstars966 - Detect-and-Track: Efficient Pose.
  • SfMLearnerstars1.6k - An unsupervised learning framework for depth and ego-motion estimation.
  • imgaugstars11.1k - Image augmentation for machine learning experiments.
  • darknet_rosstars1.2k - YOLO ROS: Real-Time Object Detection for ROS.
  • ros_ncnnstars48 - YOLACT / YOLO ( among other things ) on NCNN inference engine for ROS.
  • find-objectstars362 - Simple Qt interface to try OpenCV implementations of SIFT, SURF, FAST, BRIEF and other feature detectors and descriptors.
  • Kimera-Semanticsstars389 - Real-Time 3D Semantic Reconstruction from 2D data.
  • detectron2stars16.3k - A next-generation research platform for object detection and segmentation.
  • OpenVX - Enables performance and power-optimized computer vision processing, especially important in embedded and real-time use cases.
  • 3d-vehicle-trackingstars502 - Official implementation of Joint Monocular 3D Vehicle Detection and Tracking.
  • pysotstars3.7k - The goal of PySOT is to provide a high-quality, high-performance codebase for visual tracking research.
  • semantic_slamstars342 - Real time semantic slam in ROS with a hand held RGB-D camera.
  • packnet-sfmstars612 - Official PyTorch implementation of self-supervised monocular depth estimation methods invented by the ML Team at Toyota Research Institute (TRI).
  • AB3DMOTstars1.1k - This work proposes a simple yet accurate real-time baseline 3D multi-object tracking system.
  • monolocostars266 - Official implementation of "MonoLoco: Monocular 3D Pedestrian Localization and Uncertainty Estimation" in PyTorch.
  • Poly-YOLO - Builds on the original ideas of YOLOv3 and removes two of its weaknesses: a large amount of rewritten labels and inefficient distribution of anchors.
  • satellite-image-deep-learningstars1.3k - Resources for deep learning with satellite & aerial imagery.
  • robosatstars1.7k - Semantic segmentation on aerial and satellite imagery.
  • big_transferstars1.2k - Model for General Visual Representation Learning created by Google Research.
  • LEDNetstars454 - A Lightweight Encoder-Decoder Network for Real-time Semantic Segmentation.
  • simpledetstars2.9k - A Simple and Versatile Framework for Object Detection and Instance Recognition.
  • EasyOCRstars11.4k - Ready-to-use Optical character recognition (OCR) with 40+ languages supported including Chinese, Japanese, Korean and Thai.
  • ros_deep_learningstars465 - Deep learning inference nodes for ROS with support for NVIDIA Jetson TX1/TX2/Xavier and TensorRT.
  • hyperposestars982 - HyperPose: A Flexible Library for Real-time Human Pose Estimation.
  • fawkesstars4k - Privacy preserving tool against facial recognition systems.
  • flownet2-pytorchstars2.3k - Pytorch implementation of FlowNet 2.0: Evolution of Optical Flow Estimation with Deep Networks.

    • Sensor Processing

    Lidar and Point Cloud Processing

  • rangenet_libstars134 - Contains simple usage explanations of how the RangeNet++ inference works with the TensorRT and C++ interface.
  • lidar_super_resolutionstars105 - Simulation-based Lidar Super-resolution for Ground Vehicles.
  • Dracostars4.1k - A library for compressing and decompressing 3D geometric meshes and point clouds.
  • lidar_undistortionstars25 - Provides lidar motion undistortion based on an external 6DoF pose estimation input.
  • mmdetection3dstars1.1k - Next-generation platform for general 3D object detection.
  • depth_clusteringstars682 - Fast and robust clustering of point clouds generated with a Velodyne sensor.
  • PCDetstars1.7k - A general PyTorch-based codebase for 3D object detection from point cloud.
  • cilantrostars593 - A lean C++ library for working with point cloud data.
  • open3dstars4.4k - Open3D: A Modern Library for 3D Data Processing.
  • SqueezeSegstars489 - Implementation of SqueezeSeg, convolutional neural networks for LiDAR point clout segmentation.
  • python-pclstars1.4k - Python bindings to the pointcloud library.
  • libpointmatcherstars1k - An "Iterative Closest Point" library for 2-D/3-D mapping in Robotics.
  • lidar-bonnetalstars488 - Semantic and Instance Segmentation of LiDAR point clouds for autonomous driving.
  • CSFstars141 - LiDAR point cloud ground filtering / segmentation (bare earth extraction) method based on cloth simulation.
  • grid_mapstars1.2k - Universal grid map library for mobile robotic mapping.
  • elevation_mappingstars544 - Robot-centric elevation mapping for rough terrain navigation.
  • octomapstars1.1k - An Efficient Probabilistic 3D Mapping Framework Based on Octrees.
  • pptkstars397 - Point Processing Toolkit from HEREMaps.
  • spatio_temporal_voxel_layerstars259 - A new voxel layer leveraging modern 3D graphics tools to modernize navigation environmental representations.
  • LAStoolsstars432 - Award-winning software for efficient LiDAR processing.
  • PDALstars652 - A C++ BSD library for translating and manipulating point cloud data.
  • fast_gicpstars354 - A collection of GICP-based fast point cloud registration algorithms.
  • ndt_ompstars306 - Multi-threaded and SSE friendly NDT algorithm.
  • Go-ICPstars222 - Implementation of the Go-ICP algorithm for globally optimal 3D pointset registration.
  • PointCNNstars1.1k - A simple and general framework for feature learning from point clouds.
  • segmenters_libstars284 - The LiDAR segmenters library, for segmentation-based detection.
  • MotionNetstars93 - Joint Perception and Motion Prediction for Autonomous Driving Based on Bird's Eye View Maps.
  • PolarSegstars213 - An Improved Grid Representation for Online LiDAR Point Clouds Semantic Segmentation.
  • traversability_mappingstars62 - Takes in point cloud from a Velodyne VLP-16 Lidar and outputs a traversability map for autonomous navigation in real-time.
  • Cupochstars263 - A library that implements rapid 3D data processing and robotics computation using CUDA.
  • linefit_ground_segmentationstars205 - Implementation of the ground segmentation algorithm.
  • Votenetstars1.2k - Deep Hough Voting for 3D Object Detection in Point Clouds.
  • superpoint_graphstars549 - Large-scale Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation with Superpoint Graphs.
  • RandLA-Netstars686 - Efficient Semantic Segmentation of Large-Scale Point Clouds.
  • Det3Dstars1.1k - A first 3D Object Detection toolbox which provides off the box implementations of many 3D object detection algorithms such as PointPillars, SECOND, PIXOR.
  • OverlapNetstars322 - A modified Siamese Network that predicts the overlap and relative yaw angle of a pair of range images generated by 3D LiDAR scans.
  • mp2p_icpstars77 - A repertory of multi primitive-to-primitive (MP2P) ICP algorithms in C++.
  • OpenPCDetstars1.7k - A Toolbox for LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection.
  • PolyFitstars348 - Polygonal Surface Reconstruction from Point Clouds.
  • gpdstars343 - Takes a point cloud as input and produces pose estimates of viable grasps as output.
  • SalsaNextstars160 - Uncertainty-aware Semantic Segmentation of LiDAR Point Clouds for Autonomous Driving.
  • Super-Fast-Accurate-3D-Object-Detectionstars508 - Super Fast and Accurate 3D Object Detection based on 3D LiDAR Point Clouds (The PyTorch implementation).

    • Localization and State Estimation

  • Kalman-and-Bayesian-Filters-in-Pythonstars10.2k - Kalman Filter book using Jupyter Notebook.
  • se2lamstars297 - On-SE(2) Localization and Mapping for Ground Vehicles by Fusing Odometry and Vision.
  • mmWave-localization-learningstars53 - ML-based positioning method from mmWave transmissions - with high accuracy and energy efficiency.
  • pymap3dstars186 - Pure-Python (Numpy optional) 3D coordinate conversions for geospace ecef enu eci.
  • evostars1.5k - Python package for the evaluation of odometry and SLAM.
  • robot_localizationstars668 - A package of nonlinear state estimation nodes.
  • fusestars297 - General architecture for performing sensor fusion live on a robot.
  • RTKLIBstars242 - A version of RTKLIB optimized for single and dual frequency low cost GPS receivers, especially u-blox receivers.
  • gLAB - Performs precise modeling of GNSS observables (pseudorange and carrier phase) at the centimetre level, allowing standalone GPS positioning, PPP, SBAS and DGNSS.
  • ai-imu-drstars357 - Contains the code of our novel accurate method for dead reckoning of wheeled vehicles based only on an IMU.
  • mcl_3dlstars228 - A ROS node to perform a probabilistic 3-D/6-DOF localization system for mobile robots with 3-D LIDAR(s).
  • dynamic_robot_localizationstars359 - A ROS package that offers 3 DoF and 6 DoF localization using PCL and allows dynamic map update using OctoMap.
  • eagleyestars222 - An open-source software for vehicle localization utilizing GNSS and IMU.
  • python-sgp4stars214 - Python version of the SGP4 satellite position library.
  • PROJstars1k - Cartographic Projections and Coordinate Transformations Library.
  • rpg_trajectory_evaluationstars493 - Implements common used trajectory evaluation methods for visual(-inertial) odometry.

    • Simultaneous Localization and Mapping

    Visual

  • LSD-SLAMstars2.2k - Large-Scale Direct Monocular SLAM is a real-time monocular SLAM.
  • ESVOstars195 - A novel pipeline for real-time visual odometry using a stereo event-based camera.
  • orb_slam_2_rosstars316 - A ROS implementation of ORB_SLAM2.
  • orbslam-map-saving-extensionstars130 - In this extensions the map of ORB-features be saved to the disk as a reference for future runs along the same track.
  • dsostars1.7k - Direct Sparse Odometry.
  • viso2stars178 - A ROS wrapper for libviso2, a library for visual odometry.
  • xivostars565 - X Inertial-aided Visual Odometry.
  • roviostars811 - Robust Visual Inertial Odometry Framework.
  • CubeSLAM and ORB SLAMstars482 - Monocular 3D Object Detection and SLAM Package of CubeSLAM and ORB SLAM.
  • VINS-Fusionstars1.7k - A Robust and Versatile Multi-Sensor Visual-Inertial State Estimator.
  • openvslamstars2.9k - OpenVSLAM: A Versatile Visual SLAM Framework.
  • basalt - Visual-Inertial Mapping with Non-Linear Factor Recovery.
  • Kimerastars862 - A C++ library for real-time metric-semantic simultaneous localization and mapping, which uses camera images and inertial data to build a semantically annotated 3D mesh of the environment.
  • tagslamstars165 - A ROS-based package for Simultaneous Localization and Mapping using AprilTag fiducial markers.
  • ORB_SLAM3stars2.5k - ORB-SLAM3: An Accurate Open-Source Library for Visual, Visual-Inertial and Multi-Map SLAM.
  • Atlasstars1.3k - End-to-End 3D Scene Reconstruction from Posed Images.
  • vilibstars296 - This library focuses on the front-end of VIO pipelines with CUDA.
  • hlocstars1.1k - A modular toolbox for state-of-the-art 6-DoF visual localization. It implements Hierarchical Localization, leveraging image retrieval and feature matching, and is fast, accurate, and scalable.

    • Simultaneous Localization and Mapping

    Vector Map

  • OpenDRIVE - An open file format for the logical description of road networks.
  • assuremapingtoolsstars84 - Desktop based tool for viewing, editing and saving road network maps for autonomous vehicle platforms such as Autoware.
  • MapsModelsImporterstars1k - A Blender add-on to import models from google maps.
  • Lanelet2stars325 - Map handling framework for automated driving.
  • barefootstars557 - Online and Offline map matching that can be used stand-alone and in the cloud.
  • iDstars2.5k - The easy-to-use OpenStreetMap editor in JavaScript.
  • RapiDstars170 - An enhanced version of iD for mapping with AI created by Facebook.
  • segmapstars813 - A map representation based on 3D segments.
  • Mapboxstars7.5k - A JavaScript library for interactive, customizable vector maps on the web.
  • osrm-backendstars4.4k - Open Source Routing Machine - C++ backend.
  • geopandasstars2.6k - A project to add support for geographic data to pandas objects.
  • MapToolboxstars109 - Plugins to make Autoware vector maps in Unity.
  • imagery-indexstars20 - An index of aerial and satellite imagery useful for mapping.
  • mapillary_toolsstars187 - A library for processing and uploading images to Mapillary.
  • mapnikstars2.9k - Combines pixel-perfect image output with lightning-fast cartographic algorithms, and exposes interfaces in C++, Python, and Node.
  • grassstars305 - GRASS GIS - free and open source Geographic Information System (GIS).
  • 3d-tilesstars1.1k - Specification for streaming massive heterogeneous 3D geospatial datasets.
  • osmnxstars3k - Python for street networks. Retrieve, model, analyze, and visualize street networks and other spatial data from OpenStreetMap.

    • Planning and Control

  • aikidostars141 - Artificial Intelligence for Kinematics, Dynamics, and Optimization.
  • ACADO Toolkitstars280 - A software environment and algorithm collection for automatic control and dynamic optimization.
  • CrowdNavstars266 - Crowd-aware Robot Navigation with Attention-based Deep Reinforcement Learning.
  • rmf_corestars88 - The rmf_core packages provide the centralized functions of the Robotics Middleware Framework (RMF).
  • mb plannerstars130 - Aerial vehicle planner for tight spaces. Used in DARPA SubT Challenge.
  • pacmodstars20 - Designed to allow the user to control a vehicle with the PACMod drive-by-wire system.
  • mpccstars495 - Model Predictive Contouring Controller for Autonomous Racing.
  • rrtstars196 - C++ RRT (Rapidly-exploring Random Tree) implementation.
  • path_plannerstars579 - Hybrid A* Path Planner for the KTH Research Concept Vehicle.
  • Open Source Car Controlstars861 - An assemblage of software and hardware designs that enable computer control of modern cars in order to facilitate the development of autonomous vehicle technology.
  • commonroad - Composable benchmarks for motion planning on roads.
  • steering_functionsstars76 - Contains a C++ library that implements steering functions for car-like robots with limited turning radius.
  • moveit - Easy-to-use robotics manipulation platform for developing applications, evaluating designs, and building integrated products.
  • flexible-collision-librarystars721 - A library for performing three types of proximity queries on a pair of geometric models composed of triangles.
  • casADistars733 - A symbolic framework for numeric optimization implementing automatic differentiation in forward and reverse modes on sparse matrix-valued computational graphs.
  • control-toolboxstars600 - An efficient C++ library for control, estimation, optimization and motion planning in robotics.
  • omplstars639 - Consists of many state-of-the-art sampling-based motion planning algorithms.
  • teb_local_plannerstars513 - An optimal trajectory planner considering distinctive topologies for mobile robots based on Timed-Elastic-Bands.
  • pinocchiostars467 - A fast and flexible implementation of Rigid Body Dynamics algorithms and their analytical derivatives.
  • OpEnstars172 - A solver for Fast & Accurate Embedded Optimization for next-generation Robotics and Autonomous Systems.
  • autogenu-jupyterstars69 - This project provides the continuation/GMRES method (C/GMRES method) based solvers for nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) and an automatic code generator for NMPC.
  • topprastars263 - A library for computing the time-optimal path parametrization for robots subject to kinematic and dynamic constraints.
  • tinysplinestars637 - TinySpline is a small, yet powerful library for interpolating, transforming, and querying arbitrary NURBS, B-Splines, and Bézier curves.
  • ilqrstars145 - Iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator with auto-differentiatiable dynamics models.
  • EGO-Plannerstars195 - A lightweight gradient-based local planner without ESDF construction, which significantly reduces computation time compared to some state-of-the-art methods.
  • pykepstars213 - A scientific library providing basic tools for research in interplanetary trajectory design.
  • am_trajstars148 - Alternating Minimization Based Trajectory Generation for Quadrotor Aggressive Flight.
  • GraphBasedLocalTrajectoryPlannerstars88 - Was used on a real race vehicle during the Roborace Season Alpha and achieved speeds above 200km/h.

    • User Interaction

    Graphical User Interface

  • ddynamic_reconfigurestars53 - Allows modifying parameters of a ROS node using the dynamic_reconfigure framework without having to write cfg files.
  • elementsstars1.7k - A lightweight, fine-grained, resolution independent, modular GUI library.
  • NanoGUIstars3.7k - A minimalistic cross-platform widget library for OpenGL 3.x or higher.
  • imguistars29.4k - Designed to enable fast iterations and to empower programmers to create content creation tools and visualization / debug tools.
  • qtpystars501 - Provides an uniform layer to support PyQt5, PySide2, PyQt4 and PySide with a single codebase.
  • mirstars332 - Mir is set of libraries for building Wayland based shells.
  • rqt - A Qt-based framework for GUI development for ROS. It consists of three parts/metapackages.
  • chilipiestars950 - Easy-to-use Raspberry Pi image for booting directly into full-screen Chrome.
  • dynamic_reconfigure - The focus of dynamic_reconfigure is on providing a standard way to expose a subset of a node's parameters to external reconfiguration.

    • User Interaction

    Acoustic User Interface

  • pyostars933 - A Python module written in C containing classes for a wide variety of audio signal processing types.
  • DDSPstars1.8k - A library of differentiable versions of common DSP functions (such as synthesizers, waveshapers, and filters).
  • NoiseTorchstars3.2k - Creates a virtual microphone that suppresses noise, in any application.
  • DeepSpeechstars17.3k - An open source Speech-To-Text engine, using a model trained by machine learning techniques based on Baidu's Deep Speech research paper.
  • rhasspystars861 - Rhasspy (pronounced RAH-SPEE) is an offline, multilingual voice assistant toolkit inspired by Jasper that works well with Home Assistant, Hass.io, and Node-RED.
  • mycroft-corestars5.1k - Mycroft is a hackable open source voice assistant.
  • waveglowstars1.8k - A Flow-based Generative Network for Speech Synthesis.

    • User Interaction

    Command Line Interface

  • TerminalImageViewerstars954 - Small C++ program to display images in a (modern) terminal using RGB ANSI codes and unicode block graphics characters.
  • tmuxpstars3.1k - A session manager built on libtmux.
  • the-art-of-command-linestars88.7k - Master the command line, in one page.
  • dotfiles of cornermanstars9 - Powerful zsh and vim dotfiles.
  • dotbotstars4.2k - A tool that bootstraps your dotfiles.
  • prompt-hjemstars6 - A beautiful zsh prompt.
  • fzfstars36.6k - A command-line fuzzy finder.
  • asciimaticsstars2.7k - A cross platform package to do curses-like operations, plus higher level APIs and widgets to create text UIs and ASCII art animations.
  • rosshowstars697 - Visualize ROS topics inside a terminal with Unicode/ASCII art.
  • python-prompt-toolkitstars7k - Library for building powerful interactive command line applications in Python.
  • guakestars3.6k - Drop-down terminal for GNOME.
  • wemuxstars3.4k - Multi-User Tmux Made Easy.
  • mapsciistars5.3k - World map renderer for your console.
  • terminator - The goal of this project is to produce a useful tool for arranging terminals.
  • fxstars10.7k - Command-line tool and terminal JSON viewer.
  • tmatestars4.2k - Instant terminal sharing.

    • Data Visualization and Mission Control

    Point Cloud

  • entwinestars253 - A data organization library for massive point clouds, designed to conquer datasets of trillions of points as well as desktop-scale point clouds.
  • Potreestars2.3k - WebGL point cloud viewer for large datasets.
  • point_cloud_viewerstars272 - Makes viewing massive point clouds easy and convenient.
  • LidarViewstars152 - Performs real-time visualization and easy processing of live captured 3D LiDAR data from Lidar sensors.
  • VeloViewstars256 - Performs real-time visualization of live captured 3D LiDAR data from Velodyne's HDL sensors.
  • polyscopestars645 - A C++ & Python viewer for 3D data like meshes and point clouds.
  • Pcxstars835 - Point cloud importer & renderer for Unity.
  • ImmersivePointsstars9 - A web-application for virtual reality devices to explore 3D data in the most natural way possible.

    • Data Visualization and Mission Control

    RViz

  • rviz_satellitestars239 - Display internet satellite imagery in RViz.
  • rviz_visual_toolsstars396 - C++ API wrapper for displaying shapes and meshes in Rviz.

    • Operation System

    Server Infrastructure and High Performance Computing

  • localstackstars30.1k - A fully functional local AWS cloud stack. Develop and test your cloud & Serverless apps offline.
  • nvidia-dockerstars13.1k - Build and run Docker containers leveraging NVIDIA GPUs.
  • kubeflowstars10.3k - Machine Learning Toolkit for Kubernetes.
  • log-pilotstars1.1k - Collect logs for docker containers.
  • traefikstars33.6k - The Cloud Native Edge Router.
  • graylog2-serverstars5.7k - Free and open source log management.
  • ansiblestars48.1k - Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy.
  • pyinfrastars1.2k - It can be used for ad-hoc command execution, service deployment, configuration management and more.
  • docker-pystars5.2k - A Python library for the Docker Engine API.
  • noVNCstars7.6k - VNC client using HTML5.
  • Slurmstars1.1k - Slurm: A Highly Scalable Workload Manager.
  • jupyterhubstars6.2k - Multi-user server for Jupyter notebooks.
  • Portainerstars18k - Making Docker management easy.
  • docker-firefoxstars366 - Run a Docker Container with Firefox and noVNC for remote access to headless servers.
  • luigistars14.5k - A Python module that helps you build complex pipelines of batch jobs. It handles dependency resolution, workflow management, visualization etc. It also comes with Hadoop support built in.
  • triton-inference-serverstars2.2k - NVIDIA Triton Inference Server provides a cloud inferencing solution optimized for NVIDIA GPUs.
  • cudfstars3.9k - Provides a pandas-like API that will be familiar to data engineers & data scientists, so they can use it to easily accelerate their workflows without going into the details of CUDA programming.

    • Operation System

    Embedded Operation System

  • jetson_statsstars981 - A package to monitoring and control your NVIDIA Jetson (Xavier NX, Nano, AGX Xavier, TX1, TX2) Works with all NVIDIA Jetson ecosystem.
  • vxworks7-ros2-buildstars34 - Build system to automate the build of VxWorks 7 and ROS2.
  • Yocto - Produce tools and processes that enable the creation of Linux distributions for embedded software that are independent of the underlying architecture of the embedded hardware.
  • Automotive Graded Linux - A collaborative open source project that is bringing together automakers, suppliers and technology companies to build a Linux-based, open software platform for automotive applications that can serve as the de facto industry standard.
  • bitbakestars248 - A generic task execution engine that allows shell and Python tasks to be run efficiently and in parallel while working within complex inter-task dependency constraints.
  • Jailhousestars1.3k - Jailhouse is a partitioning Hypervisor based on Linux.
  • Xen - An open-source (GPL) type-1 or baremetal hypervisor.
  • QEMU - A generic and open source machine emulator and virtualizer.
  • qemu-xilinxstars137 - A fork of Quick EMUlator (QEMU) with improved support and modelling for the Xilinx platforms.
  • rosserialstars359 - A ROS client library for small, embedded devices, such as Arduino.
  • meta-ros - OpenEmbedded Layer for ROS Applications.
  • meta-balenastars872 - Run Docker containers on embedded devices.
  • micro-ros - The major changes compared to "regular" ROS 2 is that micro-ROS uses a Real-Time Operating System (RTOS) instead of Linux, and DDS for eXtremely Resource Constrained Environments.
  • nvidia-container-runtimestars688 - NVIDIA Container Runtime is a GPU aware container runtime, compatible with the Open Containers Initiative (OCI) specification used by Docker, CRI-O, and other popular container technologie.
  • fusesocstars635 - Package manager and build abstraction tool for FPGA/ASIC development.
  • jetson_easystars224 - Automatically script to setup and configure your NVIDIA Jetson.
  • docker-jetpack-sdkstars7 - Allows for usage of the NVIDIA JetPack SDK within a docker container for download, flashing, and install.
  • Pressed - Provides a way to set answers to questions asked during the installation process of debian, without having to manually enter the answers while the installation is running.
  • ros_jetson_statsstars42 - The ROS jetson-stats wrapper. The status of your NVIDIA jetson in diagnostic messages.
  • OpenCRstars249 - Open-source Control Module for ROS.
  • acrn-hypervisorstars678 - Defines a device hypervisor reference stack and an architecture for running multiple software subsystems, managed securely, on a consolidated system by means of a virtual machine manager.
  • jetson-containersstars267 - Machine Learning Containers for Jetson and JetPack 4.4.

    • Network and Middleware

  • Fast-RTPSstars770 - A Protocol, which provides publisher-subscriber communications over unreliable transports such as UDP, as defined and maintained by the Object Management Group (OMG) consortium.
  • performance_teststars61 - Tool to test the performance of pub/sub based communication frameworks.
  • ros1_bridgestars131 - ROS 2 package that provides bidirectional communication between ROS 1 and ROS 2.
  • protobufstars47.8k - Google's data interchange format.
  • opensplicestars199 - Vortex OpenSplice Community Edition.
  • cycloneddsstars236 - Eclipse Cyclone DDS is a very performant and robust open-source DDS implementation.
  • iceoryxstars284 - An IPC middleware for POSIX-based systems.
  • rosbridge_suitestars426 - Provides a JSON interface to ROS, allowing any client to send JSON to publish or subscribe to ROS topics, call ROS services, and more.
  • eCAL - The enhanced communication abstraction layer (eCAL) is a middleware that enables scalable, high performance interprocess communication on a single computer node or between different nodes in a computer network.
  • AUTOSAR-Adaptive - The implementation of AUTOSAR Adaptive Platform based on the R19-11.

    • Network and Middleware

    Controller Area Network

  • libuavcanstars223 - An open lightweight protocol designed for reliable communication in aerospace and robotic applications over robust vehicular networks such as CAN bus.
  • CANopenNodestars686 - The internationally standardized (EN 50325-4) (CiA301) CAN-based higher-layer protocol for embedded control system.
  • AndrOBDstars601 - Android OBD diagnostics with any ELM327 adapter.
  • ddt4allstars463 - DDT4All is a tool to create your own ECU parameters screens and connect to a CAN network with a cheap ELM327 interface.
  • cabanastars92 - CAN visualizer and DBC maker.
  • python-canstars601 - The can package provides controller area network support for Python developers.
  • python-udsoncanstars221 - Python implementation of UDS (ISO-14229) standard.
  • uds-cstars337 - Unified Diagnostics Service (UDS) and OBD-II (On Board Diagnostics for Vehicles) C Library.
  • cantoolsstars965 - CAN BUS tools in Python 3.
  • CANdevStudiostars358 - CANdevStudio aims to be cost-effective replacement for CAN simulation software. It can work with variety of CAN hardware interfaces.
  • can-utilsstars1.3k - Linux-CAN / SocketCAN user space applications.
  • ros_canopenstars184 - CANopen driver framework for ROS.
  • decanstructorstars14 - The definitive ROS CAN analysis tool.
  • kvaser_interfacestars56 - This package was developed as a standardized way to access Kvaser CAN devices from ROS.
  • canmatrixstars508 - Converting CAN Database Formats .arxml .dbc .dbf .kcd.
  • autosarstars142 - A set of python modules for working with AUTOSAR XML files.
  • SavvyCANstars326 - A Qt5 based cross platform tool which can be used to load, save, and capture canbus frames.

    • Network and Middleware

    Sensor and Acuator Interfaces

  • Tesla-APIstars1.4k - Provides functionality to monitor and control the Model S (and future Tesla vehicles) remotely.
  • flirpystars75 - A Python library to interact with FLIR thermal imaging cameras and images.
  • nerian_stereostars5 - ROS node for Nerian's SceneScan and SP1 stereo vision sensors.
  • pymmwstars77 - This is a toolbox composed of Python scripts to interact with TI's evaluation module (BoosterPack) for the IWR1443 mmWave sensing device.
  • ti_mmwave_rospkgstars114 - TI mmWave radar ROS driver (with sensor fusion and hybrid).
  • livox_ros_driverstars125 - A new ROS package, specially used to connect LiDAR products produced by Livox.
  • velodynestars389 - A collection of ROS packages supporting Velodyne high definition 3D LIDARs.
  • ubloxstars199 - Provides support for u-blox GPS receivers.
  • crazyflie_rosstars158 - ROS Driver for Bitcraze Crazyflie.
  • pointgrey_camera_driverstars105 - ROS driver for Pt. Grey cameras, based on the official FlyCapture2 SDK.
  • novatel_gps_driverstars100 - ROS driver for NovAtel GPS / GNSS receivers.
  • pylon-ros-camerastars46 - The official pylon ROS driver for Basler GigE Vision and USB3 Vision cameras.
  • ethz_piksi_rosstars47 - Contains (python) ROS drivers, tools, launch files, and wikis about how to use Piksi Real Time Kinematic (RTK) GPS device in ROS.
  • bosch_imu_driverstars36 - A driver for the sensor IMU Bosch BNO055. It was implemented only the UART communication interface (correct sensor mode should be selected).
  • oxford_gps_eth - Ethernet interface to OxTS GPS receivers using the NCOM packet structure.
  • ifm3dstars55 - Library and Utilities for working with ifm pmd-based 3D ToF Cameras.
  • cepton_sdk_rediststars17 - Provides ROS support for Cepton LiDAR.
  • jetson_csi_camstars86 - A ROS package making it simple to use CSI cameras on the Nvidia Jetson TK1, TX1, or TX2 with ROS.
  • ros_astra_camerastars165 - A ROS driver for Orbbec 3D cameras.
  • spot_rosstars94 - ROS Driver for Spot.

    • Security

  • fail2banstars6.1k - Daemon to ban hosts that cause multiple authentication errors.
  • DependencyCheckstars3k - A software composition analysis utility that detects publicly disclosed vulnerabilities in application dependencies.
  • owasp-threat-dragon-desktopstars555 - Threat Dragon is a free, open-source, cross-platform threat modeling application including system diagramming and a rule engine to auto-generate threats/mitigations.
  • launch_ros_sandboxstars16 - Can define launch files running nodes in restrained environments, such as Docker containers or separate user accounts with limited privileges.
  • wolfsslstars1.1k - A small, fast, portable implementation of TLS/SSL for embedded devices to the cloud.
  • CANalyzat0rstars593 - Security analysis toolkit for proprietary car protocols.
  • RSFstars76 - Robot Security Framework (RSF) is a standardized methodology to perform security assessments in robotics.
  • lynisstars8.4k - Security auditing tool for Linux, macOS, and UNIX-based systems. Assists with compliance testing (HIPAA/ISO27001/PCI DSS) and system hardening.
  • OpenVPNstars5.9k - An open source VPN daemon.
  • openfortivpnstars1.3k - A client for PPP+SSL VPN tunnel services and compatible with Fortinet VPNs.
  • WireGuardstars2.2k - WireGuard is a novel VPN that runs inside the Linux Kernel and utilizes state-of-the-art cryptography.
  • ssh-auditorstars521 - Scans for weak ssh passwords on your network.
  • vulscanstars2k - Advanced vulnerability scanning with Nmap NSE.
  • nmap-vulnersstars2.4k - NSE script based on Vulners.com API.
  • Firejailstars3.4k - A SUID sandbox program that reduces the risk of security breaches by restricting the running environment of untrusted applications using Linux namespaces, seccomp-bpf and Linux capabilities.
  • RVDstars92 - Robot Vulnerability Database. Community-contributed archive of robot vulnerabilities and weaknesses.
  • ros2_dds_security - Adding security enhancements by defining a Service Plugin Interface (SPI) architecture, a set of builtin implementations of the SPIs, and the security model enforced by the SPIs.
  • Security-Enhanced Linuxstars765 - A Linux kernel security module that provides a mechanism for supporting access control security policies, including mandatory access controls (MAC).
  • OpenTitanstars948 - Will make the silicon Root of Trust design and implementation more transparent, trustworthy, and secure for enterprises, platform providers, and chip manufacturers. OpenTitan is administered by lowRISC CIC as a collaborative project to produce high quality, open IP for instantiation as a full-featured product.
  • banditstars3.2k - A tool designed to find common security issues in Python code.
  • Passboltstars535 - Passbolt is a free and open source password manager that allows team members to store and share credentials securely.
  • gopassstars4k - A password manager for the command line written in Go.
  • pass - The standard unix password manager.
  • Vaultstars20.7k - A tool for securely accessing secrets. A secret is anything that you want to tightly control access to, such as API keys, passwords, certificates, and more.
  • legionstars602 - An open source, easy-to-use, super-extensible and semi-automated network penetration testing framework that aids in discovery, reconnaissance and exploitation of information systems.

    • Datasets

  • Lyft Level 5 Dataset - Level 5 is developing a self-driving system for the Lyft network. We're collecting and processing data from our autonomous fleet and sharing it with you.
  • holicitystars45 - A City-Scale Data Platform for Learning Holistic 3D Structures.
  • Mapillary Vistas Dataset - A diverse street-level imagery dataset with pixel‑accurate and instance‑specific human annotations for understanding street scenes around the world.
  • Objectronstars1.4k - A collection of short, object-centric video clips, which are accompanied by AR session metadata that includes camera poses, sparse point-clouds and characterization of the planar surfaces in the surrounding environment.
  • KITTI-360stars146 - This large-scale dataset contains 320k images and 100k laser scans in a driving distance of 73.7km.
  • waymo_rosstars6 - This is a ROS package to connect Waymo open dataset to ROS.
  • awesome-robotics-datasetsstars131 - A collection of useful datasets for robotics and computer vision.
  • nuscenes-devkitstars912 - The devkit of the nuScenes dataset.
  • utbm_robocar_datasetstars111 - EU Long-term Dataset with Multiple Sensors for Autonomous Driving.
  • DBNetstars181 - A Large-Scale Dataset for Driving Behavior Learning.
  • argoverse-apistars392 - Official GitHub repository for Argoverse dataset.
  • DDADstars221 - A new autonomous driving benchmark from TRI (Toyota Research Institute) for long range (up to 250m) and dense depth estimation in challenging and diverse urban conditions.
  • pandaset-devkitstars131 - Public large-scale dataset for autonomous driving provided by Hesai & Scale.
  • awesome-satellite-imagery-datasetsstars2k - List of satellite image training datasets with annotations for computer vision and deep learning.
  • sentinelsatstars605 - Search and download Copernicus Sentinel satellite images.
  • adas-dataset-form - Thermal Dataset for Algorithm Training.
  • h3d - The H3D is a large scale full-surround 3D multi-object detection and tracking dataset from Honda.
  • TensorFlow Datasets - TensorFlow Datasets provides many public datasets as tf.data.Datasets.
  • racetrack-databasestars26 - Contains center lines (x- and y-coordinates), track widths and race lines for over 20 race tracks (mainly F1 and DTM) all over the world.
  • BlenderProcstars618 - A procedural Blender pipeline for photorealistic training image generation.
  • UTD19 - Largest multi-city traffic dataset publically available.
  • ASTYX HIRES2019 DATASET - Automotive Radar Dataset for Deep Learning Based 3D Object Detection.

    • Data Visualization and Mission Control

  • kepler.glstars7.7k - Kepler.gl is a powerful open source geospatial analysis tool for large-scale data sets.
  • xdotstars626 - Interactive viewer for graphs written in Graphviz's dot language.
  • guacamole - Clientless remote desktop gateway. It supports standard protocols like VNC, RDP, and SSH.
  • ros3djsstars220 - 3D Visualization Library for use with the ROS JavaScript Libraries.
  • webvizstars1.1k - Web-based visualization libraries like rviz.
  • plotly.pystars9.5k - An open-source, interactive graphing library for Python.
  • PlotJugglerstars2.2k - The timeseries visualization tool that you deserve.
  • bokehstars15.1k - Interactive Data Visualization in the browser, from Python.
  • voilastars3.3k - From Jupyter notebooks to standalone web applications and dashboards.
  • rqt_bag - Provides a GUI plugin for displaying and replaying ROS bag files.
  • qgis_rosstars30 - Access bagged and live topic data in a highly featured GIS environment.
  • openmctstars9.8k - A web based mission control framework.
  • web_video_serverstars150 - HTTP Streaming of ROS Image Topics in Multiple Formats.
  • RVizWebstars140 - Provides a convenient way of building and launching a web application with features similar to RViz.
  • marvrosstars490 - MAVLink to ROS gateway with proxy for Ground Control Station.
  • octave - Provides a convenient command line interface for solving linear and nonlinear problems numerically, and for performing other numerical experiments using a language that is mostly compatible with Matlab.
  • urdf-loadersstars142 - URDF Loaders for Unity and THREE.js with example ATHLETE URDF File.
  • obs-studiostars27.8k - Free and open source software for live streaming and screen recording.

    • Operation System

    Database and Record

  • kitti_to_rosbagstars141 - A Dataset tools for working with the KITTI dataset raw data and converting it to a ROS bag. Also allows a library for direct access to poses, velodyne scans, and images.
  • ncdu - Ncdu is a disk usage analyzer with an ncurses interface.
  • borgstars7.3k - Deduplicating archiver with compression and authenticated encryption.
  • bag-databasestars180 - A server that catalogs bag files and provides a web-based UI for accessing them.
  • marv-robotics - MARV Robotics is a powerful and extensible data management platform.
  • kitti2bagstars375 - Convert KITTI dataset to ROS bag file the easy way.
  • pykittistars720 - Python tools for working with KITTI data.
  • rosbag_editorstars198 - Create a rosbag from a given one, using a simple GUI.
  • ros_type_introspectionstars49 - Deserialize ROS messages that are unknown at compilation time.
  • syncthingstars36.4k - A continuous file synchronization program.
  • rqt_bag_exporter - Qt GUI to export ROS bag topics to files (CSV and/or video).
  • xvizstars704 - A protocol for real-time transfer and visualization of autonomy data.
  • ros_numpystars150 - Tools for converting ROS messages to and from numpy arrays.
  • kitti_rosstars3 - A ROS-based player to replay KiTTI dataset.
  • DuckDBstars2.8k - An embeddable SQL OLAP Database Management System.

    • Development Environment

    Template

  • ROS - Template for ROS node standardization in C++.
  • Launch - Templates on how to create launch files for larger projects.
  • Bashstars579 - A bash scripting template incorporating best practices & several useful functions.
  • URDF - Examples on how to create Unified Robot Description Format (URDF) for different kinds of robots.
  • Python - Style guide to be followed in writing Python code for ROS.
  • Docker - The Dockerfile in the minimal-ade project shows a minimal example of how to create a custom base image.

    • Sensor Processing

    Calibration and Transformation

  • tf2 - Transform library, which lets the user keep track of multiple coordinate frames over time.
  • lidar_alignstars363 - A simple method for finding the extrinsic calibration between a 3D lidar and a 6-dof pose sensor.
  • kalibrstars2.1k - The Kalibr visual-inertial calibration toolbox.
  • Calibnetstars138 - Self-Supervised Extrinsic Calibration using 3D Spatial Transformer Networks.
  • lidar_camera_calibrationstars779 - ROS package to find a rigid-body transformation between a LiDAR and a camera.
  • ILCCstars238 - Reflectance Intensity Assisted Automatic and Accurate Extrinsic Calibration of 3D LiDAR.
  • easy_handeyestars378 - Simple, straighforward ROS library for hand-eye calibration.
  • imu_utilsstars664 - A ROS package tool to analyze the IMU performance.
  • kalibr_allanstars354 - IMU Allan standard deviation charts for use with Kalibr and inertial kalman filters.
  • pyquaternionstars213 - A full-featured Python module for representing and using quaternions.
  • robot_calibrationstars156 - This package offers calibration of a number of parameters of a robot, such as: 3D Camera intrinsics, extrinsics Joint angle offsets and robot frame offsets.
  • multi_sensor_calibrationstars198 - Contains a calibration tool to calibrate a sensor setup consisting of lidars, radars and cameras.
  • LiDARTagstars65 - A Real-Time Fiducial Tag using Point Clouds Lidar Data.
  • multicam_calibrationstars64 - Extrinsic and intrinsic calbration of cameras.
  • ikpystars325 - An Inverse Kinematics library aiming performance and modularity.
  • livox_camera_lidar_calibrationstars129 - Calibrate the extrinsic parameters between Livox LiDAR and camera.
  • lidar_camera_calibrationstars161 - Camera LiDAR Calibration using ROS, OpenCV, and PCL.

    • Sensor Processing

    Perception Pipeline

  • SARosPerceptionKittistars200 - ROS package for the Perception (Sensor Processing, Detection, Tracking and Evaluation) of the KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite.
  • multiple-object-tracking-lidarstars342 - C++ implementation to Detect, track and classify multiple objects using LIDAR scans or point cloud.
