  • cadrl_rosstars315 - ROS package for dynamic obstacle avoidance for ground robots trained with deep RL.
  • AugmentedAutoencoderstars233 - RGB-based pipeline for object detection and 6D pose estimation.
  • jsk_recognitionstars167 - A stack for the perception packages which are used in JSK lab.
  • GibsonEnvstars677 - Gibson Environments: Real-World Perception for Embodied Agents.
  • morefusionstars143 - Multi-object Reasoning for 6D Pose Estimation from Volumetric Fusion.

    • Sensor Processing

    Radar Processing

  • pyroSARstars287 - Framework for large-scale SAR satellite data processing.

    • Simultaneous Localization and Mapping

    Lidar

  • lio-mappingstars543 - Implementation of Tightly Coupled 3D Lidar Inertial Odometry and Mapping (LIO-mapping).
  • A-LOAMstars931 - Advanced implementation of LOAM.
  • Fast LOAMstars371 - Fast and Optimized Lidar Odometry And Mapping.
  • cartographer_rosstars1.1k - Provides ROS integration for Cartographer.
  • loam_livoxstars793 - A robust LiDAR Odometry and Mapping (LOAM) package for Livox-LiDAR.
  • StaticMappingstars196 - Use LiDAR to map the static world.
  • semantic_sumastars462 - Semantic Mapping using Surfel Mapping and Semantic Segmentation.
  • slam_toolboxstars488 - Slam Toolbox for lifelong mapping and localization in potentially massive maps with ROS .
  • hdl_graph_slamstars993 - An open source ROS package for real-time 6DOF SLAM using a 3D LIDAR.
  • LeGO-LOAMstars1.2k - Lightweight and Ground-Optimized Lidar Odometry and Mapping on Variable Terrain.
  • pyslamstars919 - Contains a monocular Visual Odometry (VO) pipeline in Python.
  • horizon_highway_slamstars64 - A robust, low drift, and real time highway SLAM package suitable for Livox Horizon lidar.
  • molastars209 - A Modular System for Localization and Mapping.
  • DH3Dstars104 - Deep Hierarchical 3D Descriptors for Robust Large-Scale 6DOF Relocalization.
  • LaMastars234 - LaMa is a C++11 software library for robotic localization and mapping.
  • Scan Contextstars276 - Global LiDAR descriptor for place recognition and long-term localization.

    • Prediction

  • Awesome-Interaction-aware-Trajectory-Predictionstars663 - A selection of state-of-the-art research materials on trajectory prediction.
  • sganstars527 - Socially Acceptable Trajectories with Generative Adversarial Networks.

    • Behavior and Decision

  • Grootstars277 - Graphical Editor to create BehaviorTrees. Compliant with BehaviorTree.CPP.
  • BehaviorTree.CPPstars865 - Behavior Trees Library in C++.
  • RAFCONstars118 - Uses hierarchical state machines, featuring concurrent state execution, to represent robot programs.
  • ROSPlanstars226 - Generic framework for task planning in a ROS system.
  • ad-rss-libstars182 - Library implementing the Responsibility Sensitive Safety model (RSS) for Autonomous Vehicles.
  • sts_bt_librarystars18 - This library provides the functionality to set up your own behavior tree logic by using the defined tree structures like Fallback, Sequence or Parallel Nodes.
  • SMACCstars145 - An Event-Driven, Asynchronous, Behavioral State Machine Library for real-time ROS (Robotic Operating System) applications written in C++ .

    • Data Visualization and Mission Control

    Annotation

  • labelboxstars1.5k - The fastest way to annotate data to build and ship artificial intelligence applications.
  • PixelAnnotationToolstars992 - Annotate quickly images.
  • LabelImgstars14.2k - A graphical image annotation tool and label object bounding boxes in images.
  • cvatstars5.4k - Powerful and efficient Computer Vision Annotation Tool (CVAT).
  • point_labelerstars284 - Tool for labeling of a single point clouds or a stream of point clouds.
  • label-studiostars5.8k - Label Studio is a multi-type data labeling and annotation tool with standardized output format.
  • naparistars915 - A fast, interactive, multi-dimensional image viewer for python.
  • semantic-segmentation-editorstars942 - A web based labeling tool for creating AI training data sets (2D and 3D).
  • 3d-batstars196 - 3D Bounding Box Annotation Tool for Point cloud and Image Labeling.
  • labelmestars6.5k - Image Polygonal Annotation with Python (polygon, rectangle, circle, line, point and image-level flag annotation).
  • BMW-Labeltool-Litestars171 - Provides you with a easy to use labeling tool for State-of-the-art Deep Learning training purposes.

    • Operation System

    Monitoring

  • rosmonstars116 - ROS node launcher & monitoring daemon.
  • multimaster_fkiestars153 - GUI-based management environment that is very useful to manage ROS-launch configurations and control running nodes.
  • collectdstars2.6k - A small daemon which collects system information periodically and provides mechanisms to store and monitor the values in a variety of ways.
  • lnav - An enhanced log file viewer that takes advantage of any semantic information that can be gleaned from the files being viewed, such as timestamps and log levels.
  • htopstars5.5k - An interactive text-mode process viewer for Unix systems. It aims to be a better 'top'.
  • atopstars393 - System and process monitor for Linux with logging and replay function.
  • psutilstars7.3k - Cross-platform lib for process and system monitoring in Python.
  • gputilstars716 - A Python module for getting the GPU status from NVIDA GPUs using nvidia-smi programmically in Python.
  • gpustatstars2.4k - A simple command-line utility for querying and monitoring GPU status.
  • nvtopstars3.2k - NVIDIA GPUs htop like monitoring tool.
  • spdlogstars11.6k - Very fast, header-only/compiled, C++ logging library.
  • ctopstars11.5k - Top-like interface for container metrics.
  • ntopstars4k - Web-based Traffic and Security Network Traffic Monitoring.
  • jupyterlab-nvdashboardstars396 - A JupyterLab extension for displaying dashboards of GPU usage.

    Network Distributed File System

  • sshfsstars872 - File system based on the SSH File Transfer Protocol.
  • moosefsstars1.1k - A scalable distributed storage system.
  • cephstars9.2k - A distributed object, block, and file storage platform.
  • nfsstars292 - A distributed file system protocol originally developed by Sun Microsystems.

    Real-Time Kernel

  • ELISA - Project is to make it easier for companies to build and certify Linux-based safety-critical applications – systems whose failure could result in loss of human life, significant property damage or environmental damage.
  • PREEMPT_RT kernel patch - Aim of the PREEMPT_RT kernel patch is to minimize the amount of kernel code that is non-preemptible.

    Ethernet and Wireless Networking

  • SOESstars286 - SOES is an EtherCAT slave stack written in C.
  • netplan - Simply create a YAML description of the required network interfaces and what each should be configured to do.
  • rdboxstars250 - RDBOX is a IT infrastructure for ROS robots.
  • ros_ethercatstars66 - This is a reimplementation of the main loop of pr2_ethercat without dependencies on PR2 software.
  • wavemonstars543 - An ncurses-based monitoring application for wireless network devices.
  • ptpdstars301 - PTP daemon (PTPd) is an implementation the Precision Time Protocol (PTP) version 2 as defined by 'IEEE Std 1588-2008'. PTP provides precise time coordination of Ethernet LAN connected computers.
  • iperfstars3.6k - A TCP, UDP, and SCTP network bandwidth measurement tool.
  • tcpreplaystars766 - Pcap editing and replay tools.
  • nethogsstars1.9k - It groups bandwidth by process.
  • pysharkstars1.3k - Python wrapper for tshark, allowing python packet parsing using wireshark dissectors.
  • pingtopstars348 - Ping multiple servers and show results in a top-like terminal UI.
  • termsharkstars6.4k - A terminal UI for tshark, inspired by Wireshark.
  • udpreplaystars142 - Replay UDP packets from a pcap file.
  • openwifistars1.8k - Linux mac80211 compatible full-stack IEEE802.11/Wi-Fi design based on Software Defined Radio.
